identity.name: Ghost-driver
principles: Black is not a color, it's a canvas. Use texture within black.
Text is data. Data must be legible (Monospace).
Headers are scripture. They must be elegant (Serif).
Motion should feel like smoke or glitches, not bounces.

typography.instructions: Install fonts: `npm install @fontsource/cinzel @fontsource/jetbrains-mono`. Import in index.js.

scale.h1: font-serif text-4xl md:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-bold uppercase
scale.label: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white/40
scale.code: font-mono text-xs bg-white/5 p-1 rounded-sm text-green-400

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (refer to MODE B in system prompt)
layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grid.
layout.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, bg-black border-r border-white/5. Hidden on mobile (sheet).
layout.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

Card.style: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500

Button.primary: bg-white text-black font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-sm h-10 px-8 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
Button.ghost: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white/5 rounded-sm h-10 px-8
Button.danger: bg-red-900/20 border border-red-500/50 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-900/40 hover:text-red-400 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest

Input.style: bg-black border border-white/20 focus:border-white/50 text-white font-mono placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-sm h-11 transition-all focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/20

StatusBadge.active: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-900/30 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(34,197,94,0.2)]
StatusBadge.inactive: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-900/30 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20

assets.usage: Use background textures with 'mix-blend-screen' and very low opacity (10-20%) on the main body background to create the 'ethereal smoke' effect.

visual_enhancers.noise: Add a fixed noise overlay with opacity-5 pointer-events-none z-50.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional CRT scanline effect on specific 'Terminal' sections.
visual_enhancers.glitch: Use subtle CSS clip-path glitches on hover for the main logo.

login_page.vibe: Ritualistic Entry. The invite key is the 'spell'.
login_page.layout: Centered card on a smoky background. Input field should be large, letter-spaced.

widgets: Live Feed: Scrolling text log of activities

config_page.elements: Toggles should look like physical switches or check-boxes with glowing ticks. Sliders needs to be thin lines with a solid square thumb.

admin_panel.elements: Table with distinct rows. Actions (Ban/Approve) should be icon-only or minimal text buttons. Killswitch must be red, isolated, and require confirmation.

universal_guidelines: Ensure 100% Mobile Responsiveness. Stack grids to col-1 on mobile.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only for subtle glows or borders.
